sql: SELECT tom0.c0 >> COALESCE( X'68656C6C6F' ) & LN( tom0.c0 ) % tom0.c0 AS c0 FROM t0 AS tom0 WHERE PI( ) ORDER BY c0 , c0 ASC LIMIT 42;

SELECT CONVERT_TZ( ADDDATE('1970-01-01', COUNT( tom2.c0 )) , '+00:00' , 'MET' ) AS c2 FROM ( SELECT ADDTIME( '2025-12-31 14:30:00' , '14:30:00' ) AS c0 FROM t0 AS tom0 WHERE VERSION( ) GROUP BY tom0.c0 HAVING TO_SECONDS( c0 ) INTERSECT SELECT IFNULL( '2025-12-31 14:30:00' , IFNULL( '2025-12-31 14:30:00' , ADDTIME( '2025-12-31 14:30:00' , '14:30:00' ) ) ) AS c1 FROM t0 AS tom1 WHERE ABS( '2025-12-31 14:30:00' OR '2025-12-31 14:30:00' ) LIMIT 42 ) AS tom2 WHERE DATE_ADD( tom2.c0 , INTERVAL 1 HOUR )  ORDER BY c2 ASC LIMIT 42;

MAX( MICROSECOND( tom7.c0 ) ) AS c13 FROM t0 AS tom7 WHERE '2025'  INTERSECT SELECT b'101010' AS c14 ,COALESCE( COALESCE( ABS( b'101010' ) ) ) AS c15 ,b'101010' AS c16 ,ACOS( 42 ) AS c17 FROM tom4 AS tom8 WHERE '2025-12-31 14:30:00' LIMIT 42 ) AS tom9 , ( t0 AS tom10 JOIN tom2 AS tom11 ON TIME_FORMAT( SUBTIME( '14:30:00' , '14:30:00' ) , '%I' ) ) ) WHERE SCHEMA( ) GROUP BY tom11.c1 , tom10.c0 HAVING BINARY( '2025-12-31' ) LIMIT 1)=( SELECT MIN( USER( ) ) AS c26 FROM ( SELECT SCHEMA( ) AS c19 , LEAST( COALESCE( ADDTIME( '14:30:00' , '14:30:00' ) ) , '14:30:00' ) AS c20 , NULLIF( MONTHNAME( tom12.c2 ) NOT LIKE '_' , tom12.c5 ) AS c21 , TIMESTAMPADD( SQL_TSI_MONTH , tom12.c3 , tom12.c2 ) AS c22 , COALESCE( b'101010' ) AS c23 , CURTIME() AS c24 , INET6_ATON( tom13.c3 ) AS c25 FROM ( tom2 AS tom12 JOIN tom2 AS tom13 USING (c6)) WHERE CASE WHEN IF( tom13.c4 NOT REGEXP X'68656C6C6F' , tom12.c2 , DATE_SUB( tom12.c2 , INTERVAL 1 HOUR ) ) NOT REGEXP tom13.c2 THEN tom12.c3 ELSE PERIOD_ADD( 202312 , tom13.c3 ) END -
